item.title: Track Your Job Search Success! 📈 • List job applications sent this week. • Count interview invitations received. • Track follow-ups completed with recruiters. 📧 • Calculate response rate from applications. • Note any job offers or rejections. How will tracking these metrics improve your job search strategy? #jobsearch #metrics #ScalePilot #SocialPilot #AIAutomations
item.description: Track Your Job Search Success! 📈 • List job applications sent this week. • Count interview invitations received. • Track follow-ups completed with recruiters. 📧 • Calculate response rate from applications. • Note any job offers or rejections. How will tracking these metrics improve your job search strategy? #jobsearch #metrics #ScalePilot #SocialPilot #AIAutomations
